summary: Frontend-only verification of post-iter-362 UI pack (5 fixes): content-studio download fix, footer phone correction, 'Share on socials' button, uniform admin navbar gap, new tagline. All 5 fixes CONFIRMED WORKING end-to-end.
action_items: OPTIONAL (non-blocking): backend/public_branding_routes.py L14 and backend/services/settings_resolver.py L27 still contain legacy tagline 'Business Procurement Simplified' as default fallback. These files are outside the primary branding endpoint (/api/content-engine/template-data/branding) and are not surfaced in the content creatives or admin UI from this pass, but main agent may want to sync them to 'One-stop shop for products, services & deals' for global consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: CreativeDrawer now correctly renders a 1:1 off-screen clone (data-testid=branded-creative duplicated with left:-99999px) for html2canvas export — verified DOM has 2 instances, one at left=1342 (scaled preview) and one at left=-99999 w=1080 (export target).

renderCanvas awaits document.fonts.ready and passes width/height/windowWidth/windowHeight to html2canvas — downloaded PNG is a valid 2160x2160 RGBA (≈847KB) file with correct aspect ratio and non-zero content.
Font stack switched from Inter to 'Arial, Helvetica, Segoe UI, sans-serif' on .branded-creative wrapper — eliminates the glyph-fallback overlap issue.

Share handler correctly falls back on desktop: triggers image download + opens https://wa.me/?text=<caption> (browser auto-redirects to api.whatsapp.com/send/?text=… which is expected WhatsApp Web behaviour).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-363 fixes green. If user reports the downloaded image still looks bad, the raw fetched PNG is 2160x2160 RGBA ~847KB, so html2canvas IS capturing the off-screen 1:1 clone correctly. Any remaining visual complaints at that point would be purely content-layout, not the garbled-glyph bug.

1_branding_endpoint.tagline: One-stop shop for products, services & deals
